DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tab1; CREATE TABLE tab1 (i UInt32, j UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY i ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT i, j, partitionID(i) AS part_id FROM tab1 ORDER BY part_id;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tab2; CREATE TABLE tab2 (i UInt32, j UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY i ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT t1.i, t1.j, t2.j, partitionID(t1.i) AS part_id1, partitionID(t2.i) AS part_id2 FROM tab1 t1 JOIN tab2 t2 ON t1.i = t2.i ORDER BY part_id1, part_id2;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tab3; CREATE TABLE tab3 (i UInt32, j UInt32, k UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY i ORDER BY tuple();
SELECT i, j, k, partitionID(i, j) AS part_id FROM tab3;
CREATE TABLE temp (m UInt32, n UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY m ORDER BY (n, m);
SELECT m, n, partitionID(m, n) AS part_id FROM temp ORDER BY part_id;
CREATE TABLE tab4 (a UInt32, b UInt32, c UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY a ORDER BY c;
SELECT a, b, partitionID(a) AS part_id FROM (SELECT DISTINCT a, b FROM tab4) AS sub;
SELECT partitionID(a) AS part_id FROM tab4 WHERE a IN (SELECT DISTINCT a FROM tab4 WHERE c < 400);
CREATE TABLE joined_tab (x UInt32, y UInt32, z UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() PARTITION BY x ORDER BY (y, z);
SELECT x, y, z, partitionID(x) FROM joined_tab WHERE partitionID(x) = 1;
